debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
I J : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
h_J_le_I : I ≤ J
h_I_le_J : J ≤ I
h_final_left : ∀ N ∈ J, N ∈ I
⊢ ∀ N ∈ I, N ∈ J

failed_attempts:
intro N h_N_in_I
      have h_mem : N ∈ sSup (SetLike.coe J) := by
        simpa [J.sSup_eq_top] using (show N ≤ (⊤ : PersistenceSubmodule M) from le_top)
      rcases (h_I_le_J h_mem) with ⟨B, h_B_sub, h_eq⟩
      have h_B_ne_empty : B.Nonempty := by
        by_contra h_empty
        have h_B_empty : B = ∅ := Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h_empty
        have : N = (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by simpa [h_B_empty] using h_eq
        exact I.not_bot_mem (this ▸ h_N_in_I)
      rcases h_B_ne_empty with ⟨b, hb⟩
      have hbJ : b ∈ J := h_B_sub hb
      have hbI : b ∈ I := h_final_left b hbJ
      have h_b_le_N : b ≤ N := by
        have : b ≤ sSup B := le_sSup hb
        simpa [h_eq] using this
      have h_N_le_b : N ≤ b := by
        have h_disj : Disjoint N b := by
          have h_neq : N ≠ b := by
            intro hNb
            exact hbJ (hNb ▸ h_N_in_I)
          exact (sSupIndep_pair h_neq).1 (sSupIndep.mono I.sSupIndep' (by
            intro X hX
            rcases hX with ⟨hX⟩
            · exact hX ▸ h_N_in_I
            subst X
            exact hbI))
        exact le_trans (by simpa [inf_eq_left.2 h_b_le_N] using (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj))
          bot_le
      have h_eq_nb : N = b := le_antisymm h_N_le_b h_b_le_N
      exact h_eq_nb ▸ hbJ

intro N hN
      have : N ∈ J := by
        have h' := h_final_left N hN
        simpa using h'
      exact this

intro Y hY
                rcases hY with ⟨hY⟩
                · exact (hY ▸ hxI)
                subst Y
                exact hbI
              exact (sSupIndep_pair (by
                intro h'
                exact hxb (by simpa using h'))).mp (sSupIndep.mono I.sSupIndep' hs)
            have hle : x ≤ x ⊓ b := le_inf le_rfl hx_le_b
            have : x ≤ (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) :=
              hle.trans (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp hdisj)
            simpa [le_bot_iff] using this
          have : x ∈ J := hxJ
          exact False.elim (J.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hxJ))
        have : N = b := le_antisymm (le_trans hN_le_b hb_le) hb_le
        exact this ▸ hbJ
      exact this

intro N hN
      have hN_in : N ∈ I.carrier := hN
      obtain ⟨B, hBsub, hEq⟩ := h_I_le_J hN_in
      have hB_in_J : ∀ b ∈ B, b ∈ J := by
        intro b hb
        have hbI : b ∈ I := hBsub hb
        exact h_final_left b (hbI)
      have hBsub' : B ⊆ J := by
        intro b hb
        exact hB_in_J b hb
      have h_le : N ≤ sSup J := by
        rw [hEq]
        exact sSup_le_sSup hBsub'
      rw [J.sSup_eq_top] at h_le
      simpa using (show N ∈ (⊤ : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) from trivial)

intro N hN
      have hJ : sSup J = (⊤ : PersistenceSubmodule M) := J.sSup_eq_top
      have hI : sSup I = (⊤ : PersistenceSubmodule M) := I.sSup_eq_top
      have hN_le_top : N ≤ ⊤ := le_top
      have hN_le_sSupJ : N ≤ sSup J := by simpa [hJ]
      have hN_eq_sSup : N = sSup {X | X ∈ J ∧ X ≤ N} := by
        apply le_antisymm
        · have : sSup {X | X ∈ J ∧ X ≤ N} ≤ N := by
            refine sSup_le ?_
            intro X hX
            exact hX.2
          exact this
        · have h_decomp : ∃ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B ⊆ J ∧ N = sSup B := h_I_le_J hN
          rcases h_decomp with ⟨B, hBJ, rfl⟩
          refine sSup_le_sSup ?_
          intro X hX
          exact ⟨hBJ hX, le_sSup hX⟩
      have hN_in : N ∈ J := by
        by_contra hNnot
        have h_disj : Disjoint N (sSup {X | X ∈ J ∧ X ≤ N}) := by
          exact I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN
            (by
              intro X hX
              exact h_final_left X hX.1)
            (by
              intro hmem
              exact hNnot (hmem.1))
        have hN_ne_bot : N ≠ (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
          intro hbot
          exact I.not_bot_mem (hbot ▸ hN)
        have h_lt : sSup {X | X ∈ J ∧ X ≤ N} < N ⊔ sSup {X | X ∈ J ∧ X ≤ N} := by
          exact (right_lt_sup_of_left_ne_bot h_disj (by simpa [sup_comm] using hN_ne_bot))
        have h_eq : sSup {X | X ∈ J ∧ X ≤ N} = N := by
          rw [← hN_eq_sSup]
        have : N < N := by
          simpa [h_eq, sup_eq_left.2 (by simpa [h_eq] using le_sup_left)] using h_lt
        exact lt_irrefl _ this
      exact hN_in

intro N hN
      have h_mem : N ∈ J := by
        have h_s : ∃ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B ⊆ J ∧ N = sSup B := h_I_le_J hN
        rcases h_s with ⟨B, hBJ, h_eq⟩
        have h_le : N ≤ sSup J := by
          rw [← h_eq]
          exact le_trans (le_rfl) (sSup_le_sSup hBJ)
        rw [J.sSup_eq_top] at h_le
        have hN_ne_bot : N ≠ (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
          intro hbot
          exact I.not_bot_mem (hbot ▸ hN)
        have : N ∈ B := by
          by_contra h_not
          have h_disj : Disjoint N (sSup B) :=
            (I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN (le_trans hBJ (h_final_left · ·)) h_not)
          have : sSup B = (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) :=
            Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le (disjoint_comm.mp h_disj) (by simpa [h_eq] using le_rfl)
          exact hN_ne_bot (by simpa [h_eq] using this)
        exact hBJ this
      exact h_mem

intro N hN
      have hIJ : I = J := by
        ext X
        constructor
        · exact h_final_right X
        · exact h_final_left X
      simpa [hIJ] using hN
exact hN_in_J

intro N hN
      exact (h_final_left N hN)

intro N hN
      have hN_in_J : N ∈ J := by
        rcases (h_J_le_I hN) with ⟨B, hB, hEq⟩
        have hB' : B ⊆ J := by
          intro b hb
          exact h_final_left b (hB hb)
        have hN_mem_sSupB : N ∈ sSup B := by
          simpa [hEq] using (le_sSup (a := N) hN)
        have hN_mem_sSupJ : N ∈ sSup (SetLike.coe J) := le_trans (sSup_le_sSup hB') hN_mem_sSupB
        simpa [J.sSup_eq_top] using hN_mem_sSupJ
      exact hN_in_J

intro N hN
      have h_mem : N ∈ J.carrier := by
        have : N ∈ I.carrier := hN
        exact h_final_left N (by simpa using this)
      simpa using h_mem
exact this

intro N hN
      have : N ∈ J := by
        have hJ : ∃ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B ⊆ J ∧ N = sSup B := h_J_le_I hN
        rcases hJ with ⟨B, hBJ, hNsup⟩
        have h_exists : ∃ b, b ∈ B := by
          by_contra hB
          push_neg at hB
          have : (sSup B : PersistenceSubmodule M) = ⊥ := by
            simp [sSup_eq_bot, hB]
          have : N = (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by simpa [hNsup] using congrArg id this
          exact I.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hN)
        rcases h_exists with ⟨b, hbB⟩
        have hbJ : b ∈ J := hBJ hbB
        have hbI : b ∈ I := h_final_left b hbJ
        have hle : b ≤ N := by
          rw [hNsup]
          exact le_sSup hbB
        have : b = N := by
          apply le_antisymm
          · exact hle
          · have : N ≤ b := by
              have := RefinementMapLE (M := M) J I h_I_le_J ⟨b, hbI⟩
              have hb_le : b ≤ (RefinementMap (M := M) J I h_I_le_J ⟨b, hbI⟩).val := this
              have hN_le : N ≤ (RefinementMap (M := M) J I h_I_le_J ⟨b, hbI⟩).val := le_trans (le_trans (le_rfl) hb_le) (le_of_eq rfl)
              have hmap_eq : RefinementMap (M := M) J I h_I_le_J ⟨b, hbI⟩ = ⟨N, hN⟩ :=
                SendsToUniqueGE (M := M) J I h_I_le_J ⟨b, hbI⟩ ⟨N, hN⟩ hle
              have : (RefinementMap (M := M) J I h_I_le_J ⟨b, hbI⟩).val = N := by
                simpa [hmap_eq]
              exact this ▸ hN_le
          · exact this
        exact this ▸ hbJ
      exact this

intro N hN
      have hN_in_J : N ∈ J := by
        rcases (h_J_le_I hN) with ⟨B, hBsub, hEq⟩
        have hB_mem : ∃ b, b ∈ B := by
          by_contra h
          push_neg at h
          have : B = ∅ := by
            ext b; simp [Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem, h]
          have h_bot : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) = ⊥ := by
            simpa [this] using hEq
          exact I.not_bot_mem (h_bot ▸ hN)
        rcases hB_mem with ⟨b, hbB⟩
        have hbI : b ∈ I := hBsub hbB
        have hbJ : b ∈ J := h_final_left b hbI
        have h_le_b : N ≤ b := by
          simpa [hEq] using le_sSup hbB
        have h_le_N : b ≤ N := by
          rcases (h_I_le_J hbJ) with ⟨C, hCsub, hbEq⟩
          have hC_mem : ∃ c, c ∈ C := by
            by_contra h
            push_neg at h
            have : C = ∅ := by
              ext c; simp [Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem, h]
            have h_bot : (b : PersistenceSubmodule M) = ⊥ := by
              simpa [this] using hbEq
            exact J.not_bot_mem (h_bot ▸ hbJ)
          rcases hC_mem with ⟨c, hcC⟩
          have hcJ : c ∈ J := hCsub hcC
          have hcI : c ∈ I := h_final_left c hcJ
          have h_le_c : b ≤ c := by
            simpa [hbEq] using le_sSup hcC
          have h_le_N' : c ≤ N := by
            simpa [hEq] using le_sSup (hBsub hbB)
          exact le_trans h_le_c h_le_N'
        have h_eq : (b : PersistenceSubmodule M) = N := le_antisymm h_le_N h_le_b
        exact h_eq ▸ hbJ
      exact hN_in_J

intro N hN
      have hNJ : N = sSup ({N} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := by
        simp
      rcases h_I_le_J hN with ⟨B, hBsub, hNeq⟩
      have hB_in_J : ∀ b ∈ B, b ∈ J := fun b hb => h_final_left b (hBsub hb)
      have hBsub' : B ⊆ J := by
        intro b hb
        exact hB_in_J b hb
      have hNeq' : N = sSup B := hNeq
      have hN_mem_J : N ∈ J := by
        have : sSup B ∈ J := by
          have hBsub'' : B ⊆ I := hBsub
          have h_sup_in_I : sSup B ∈ I := by
            have h_le : sSup B ≤ sSup I := sSup_le_sSup hBsub''
            have h_top : sSup I = (⊤ : PersistenceSubmodule M) := I.sSup_eq_top
            have : sSup B ≤ ⊤ := by simpa [h_top] using h_le
            have : sSup B = ⊤ := by
              apply le_antisymm this
              rw [← hNeq', I.sSup_eq_top]
              exact le_rfl
            simpa [this] using (show (⊤ : PersistenceSubmodule M) ∈ I from by
              have : (⊤ : PersistenceSubmodule M) = sSup (SetLike.coe I) := by
                symm; exact I.sSup_eq_top
              simpa [this] using (by
                classical
                by_contra htop
                exact I.not_bot_mem (by simpa using htop)))
          exact h_final_left _ h_sup_in_I
        simpa [hNeq'] using this
      simpa [hNeq] using hN_mem_J

intro N hN
      have hJ' : ∀ N ∈ I, N ∈ J := by
        intro N hN
        have hI' : ∀ N ∈ J, N ∈ I := by
          intro N hN
          exact h_final_left N hN
        have h_final_left' : ∀ N ∈ I, N ∈ J := by
          intro N hN
          have : N ∈ I := hN
          have : N ∈ J := by
            have h_final_left'' : ∀ N ∈ I, N ∈ J := by
              intro N hN
              have h_final_left''' : ∀ N ∈ I, N ∈ J := by
                intro N hN
                have : N ∈ I := hN
                rcases (h_J_le_I (N := N) hN) with ⟨B, hBsub, hEq⟩
                have htop : sSup B ∈ J := by
                  have : sSup B = N := by simpa [hEq]
                  simpa [this] using (show N ∈ J from by
                    have : ∀ X ∈ J, X ∈ I := h_final_left
                    have : N ∈ I := hN
                    rcases (h_J_le_I (N := N) hN) with ⟨B, hBsub, hEq⟩
                    have : N = sSup B := hEq.symm
                    subst this
                    have : B.Nonempty := by
                      by_contra hne
                      have : B = ∅ := Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem.2 (by intro x; exact hne ⟨x, ·⟩)
                      simp [this] at hEq
                      exact I.not_bot_mem hN
                    classical
                    rcases this with ⟨b, hb⟩
                    have : b ∈ J := hBsub hb
                    exact this)
                exact (by
                  simpa [hEq] using (show N ∈ J from by
                    classical
                    rcases (h_J_le_I (N := N) hN) with ⟨B, hBsub, hEq⟩
                    have : ∃ b, b ∈ B := by
                      by_contra hne
                      have : B = ∅ := Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem.2 (by intro x; exact hne ⟨x, ·⟩)
                      simp [this] at hEq
                      exact I.not_bot_mem hN
                    rcases this with ⟨b, hb⟩
                    exact hBsub hb))
                exact h_final_left''' N hN
              exact h_final_left'' N hN
            exact h_final_left'' N hN
          exact this
        exact h_final_left' N hN
      exact hJ' N hN

intro N hN
      have hJ : N ∈ J := by
        by_contra hNot
        have hN_in_J : N ∉ J := hNot
        let N' : I := ⟨N, hN⟩
        have h_A : ∃ A : J, N ≤ A.val := by
          exact (RefinementMapSurj' J I h_J_le_I) N'
        rcases h_A with ⟨A, h_N_le_A⟩
        have h_A_in_I : A.val ∈ I := h_final_left A.val A.prop
        let A' : I := ⟨A.val, h_A_in_I⟩
        have h_A_le_N : A.val ≤ N := by
          have := RefinementMapLE (I := J) (J := I) (h := h_J_le_I) N'
          have h_map : RefinementMap J I h_J_le_I N' = A := by
            exact SendsToUniqueGE (I := J) (J := I) (h := h_J_le_I) N' A h_N_le_A
          simpa [h_map] using this
        have h_eq : A.val = N := le_antisymm h_A_le_N h_N_le_A
        have : N ∈ J := by
          simpa [h_eq] using A.prop
        exact hN_in_J this
      exact hJ

intro N hN
      have hJI : ∀ N ∈ I, N ∈ J := by
        intro N hN
        exact h_final_left N hN
      exact hJI N hN
this

exact hNB N h_mem
        exact this
      exact hN_in_J

intro N hN
      have hJI : ∃ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B ⊆ J ∧ N = sSup B := h_J_le_I hN
      rcases hJI with ⟨B, hBsub, hNsSup⟩
      have hB_in_I : ∀ b, b ∈ B → b ∈ I := by
        intro b hb
        exact h_final_left b (hBsub hb)
      have hNB : N ∈ B := by
        by_contra hNnot
        have h_disj : Disjoint N (sSup B) :=
          I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN (fun b hb => hB_in_I b hb) hNnot
        have hN_ne_bot : N ≠ (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
          intro hbot
          exact I.not_bot_mem (hbot ▸ hN)
        have hlt : sSup B < N ⊔ sSup B := by
          simpa [sup_comm] using (left_lt_sup_of_right_ne_bot h_disj hN_ne_bot)
        have hle : N ⊔ sSup B ≤ sSup B := by
          apply sup_le
          · simpa [hNsSup] using le_sSup (a := N) hN
          · exact le_rfl
        exact (lt_irrefl (sSup B)) (lt_of_lt_of_le hlt hle)
      have hNBJ : N ∈ J := hBsub hNB
      exact hNBJ

intro N hN
      have : N ∈ J := by
        have hN' : N ∈ I := h_final_left N (h_I_le_J hN).choose_spec.1 (by
          have := (h_I_le_J hN).choose_spec.2
          simpa [this] )
        exact (h_I_le_J hN).choose_spec.1 hN'
      exact this

intro N hN
      have : N ∈ J := by
        have hN' : N ∈ I := hN
        rcases (h_I_le_J hN') with ⟨B, hBsub, hEq⟩
        have hBne : B.Nonempty := by
          by_contra hBemp
          have hBempty : B = ∅ := Set.not_nonempty_iff.mp hBemp
          have : (sSup B : PersistenceSubmodule M) = ⊥ := by
            simp [hBempty]
          have hNbot : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) = ⊥ := by simpa [hEq] using this
          exact I.not_bot_mem (hNbot ▸ hN)
        rcases hBne with ⟨b, hbB⟩
        have hbI : b ∈ I := hBsub hbB
        have hbJ : b ∈ J := h_final_left b (by
          have : b ∈ I := hbI
          exact this)
        have hbsup : b ≤ sSup B := le_sSup hbB
        have hbN : b ≤ N := by simpa [hEq] using hbsup
        rcases (h_J_le_I hbJ) with ⟨C, hCsub, hbEq⟩
        have hbCne : C.Nonempty := by
          by_contra hCemp
          have hCempty : C = ∅ := Set.not_nonempty_iff.mp hCemp
          have : (sSup C : PersistenceSubmodule M) = ⊥ := by
            simp [hCempty]
          have hbbot : (b : PersistenceSubmodule M) = ⊥ := by simpa [hbEq] using this
          exact J.not_bot_mem (hbbot ▸ hbJ)
        rcases hbCne with ⟨c, hcC⟩
        have hcJ : c ∈ J := hCsub hcC
        have hcI : c ∈ I := h_final_left c hcJ
        have hc_le_b : c ≤ b := by
          have : c ≤ sSup C := le_sSup hcC
          simpa [hbEq] using this
        have hc_le_N : c ≤ N := le_trans hc_le_b hbN
        have hNmem : N ∈ J := by
          have hNle : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) ≤ c := by
            have : N = sSup B := hEq
            have hc_in_B : c ∈ B := by
              have : c ∈ I := hcI
              exact this
            have : c ∈ B := by
              have : c ∈ I := hcI
              exact this
            have hcB : c ∈ B := by
              have : c ∈ I := hcI
              exact this
            have hc_sup : c ≤ sSup B := le_sSup (by
              have : c ∈ B := by
                have : c ∈ I := hcI
                exact this
              exact this)
            exact le_trans (le_of_eq (by rfl)) (le_of_eq (by rfl))
          exact hcJ
        exact hNmem
      exact this

exact this N hN
      exact hN_in_J

intro N hN
      have hN_in_J : N ∈ J := by
        rcases h_J_le_I hN with ⟨B, hBsub, hN_eq⟩
        have hBne : B.Nonempty := by
          by_contra hBempty
          have hBempty' : B = ∅ := Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp hBempty
          have : (sSup B : PersistenceSubmodule M) = ⊥ := by simp [hBempty']
          have hNbot : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) = ⊥ := by simpa [hN_eq] using this
          exact I.not_bot_mem (hNbot ▸ hN)
        rcases hBne with ⟨b, hbB⟩
        have hbJ : b ∈ J := hBsub hbB
        have hbI : b ∈ I := h_final_left b hbJ
        have hbleN : b ≤ N := by simpa [hN_eq] using (le_sSup hbB)
        have hb_eq_N : b = N := by
          have := UniqueGE J I ⟨b, hbJ⟩ ⟨b, hbI⟩ ⟨N, hN⟩
              (by constructor <;> simpa using hbleN)
          simpa using this
        simpa [hb_eq_N] using hbJ
      exact hN_in_J

intro N hN
      have : N ∈ I := h_final_left N (by
        have := h_J_le_I hN
        rcases this with ⟨B, hBsub, hEq⟩
        have hNB : N ∈ B := by
          have hNle : N ≤ sSup B := by
            simpa [hEq] using le_rfl
          by_contra hnot
          have hdisj : Disjoint N (sSup B) :=
            I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN (by
              intro X hX; exact hBsub hX) hnot
          exact (lt_irrefl (N ⊔ sSup B)) <|
            (right_lt_sup_of_left_ne_bot hdisj (by
              intro hbot
              exact I.not_bot_mem (hbot ▸ hN)))
        have : sSup B ∈ I := by
          have hBsub' : B ⊆ (SetLike.coe I) := hBsub
          have : sSup B ≤ sSup (SetLike.coe I) := sSup_le_sSup hBsub'
          have : sSup B = ⊤ := by
            have : sSup (SetLike.coe I) = ⊤ := I.sSup_eq_top
            exact top_unique (this ▸ this ▸ le_rfl)
          simpa [this] using (I.sSup_eq_top ▸ trivial)
        exact hNB)
      exact (h_final_left N ?_)

exact hJ N hN
      exact hmem
